releaseNotes: Fixed Live TV freezing the channel and the whole app right after switching channels - it was silently forcing a display refresh-rate change on every single switch even with Auto Frame Rate off, which some Firestick hardware can't handle cleanly. Reduced the EPG guide window from 14 days to 3 so it loads faster and more completely. Added Multi-Screen dual-account support: if your account allows 2+ connections, or you've linked a second account, Multi-Screen streams a second box automatically with its own channel picker, full-width video on both boxes, a Record button on each box, and the ability to switch which one's audio is playing - handy for commercials. Fixed Multi-Screen freezing or silently getting stuck on one box while the other kept playing, and a visual glitch where the two videos bled into each other - both boxes now recover automatically from playback hiccups instead of freezing. Long-press any program in the Guide to set a reminder that switches to that channel automatically (or just notifies you) when it starts. Also improved compatibility with channels that use less standard stream formats.
